content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1437: Frantic Suppression!

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

Undersea Ruins.

Shi Yan sat neatly atop the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, his face stern. He was trying to find a way to break the light curtain.

He didn’t know that because of Yerburgh, Telika, Farlow, Ling Mei, and Tate, the entire Sea of Annihilation was surging. The experts of the Soul Clan, Mysterious Sky Clan, Devouring Clan, Black Demon Clan, and Ancient Monster Clan in the Sea of Annihilation were using different channels to confirm why their juniors died.

The five clans announced that they were trying their best to find the murderers. They had urged their forces to search through the entire Sea of Annihilation, whether they were on the surface or on the seabed!

At this moment, the experts of the five clans had visited each island in the Sea of Annihilation. The Phantom Clan was also trying to search and call for Mei Ji to come back to the clan.

The Sea of Annihilation erupted as if it detonated. This incident was much more influential than many people had expected.

Quickly, the information about the Absolute Beginning vestige released unknowingly. The secret of the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was revealed, angering the other clans besides the Seven Great Clans.

The Sea of Annihilation was hustling and bustling. People moved around on the sea, in the seabed, and at every corner. The warriors began to search for something.

——————————

“If we can’t leave soon, Neptune will come at any minute. I know the Soul Clan’s evil deeds and I know how Neptune is. I’m sure he can vaguely locate us from Tate’s death.” Ming Hong became solemn. “At his realm and cultivation base, once he finds the right direction, he will arrive faster than we think...”

What Ming Hong had said had put more pressure on the group. Audrey and Mei Ji decided to stay silent. They didn’t dare to talk as they were afraid that they could enrage the God Lord and Ming Hao, which would bring Shi Yan unnecessary troubles.

The God Lord looked cold and harsh. His eyes scanned Shi Yan, the cold intention on his face clear.

He was losing his patience.

“If he can’t break the confinement, you two will be buried with him!” the God Lord snorted, his eyes fell on Audrey and Mei Ji. The two women felt shivers running down their spines.

“You can’t touch Audrey if I’m here,” Ming Hao wore a cold face.

Mei Ji felt so chilled. Pondering, she forced a smile. “Yeah, you can kill me. But if Shi Yan can’t break this place, even if I die, you won’t live. None of us can leave, to be exact. Neptune alone can kill all of us!”

Hearing her, Ming Hao and the God Lord became more restless. They all grimaced.

“Shut up! All of you!” Shi Yan bellowed and landed all of a sudden. From a distance, he looked at the God Lord and then at Ming Hao, speaking coldly. “You two, shut your mouths too!”

Then, the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower bloomed with billions of dazzling light rays. It began to move with ultimate power, grumblingly pressing down on the God Lord and Ming Hao. “You guys can kill Batum and Gan Fu here. I can kill you too. Do you think you’re that strong?”

The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower suddenly emitted the formidable Heavenly Might. It rose in the void and then grumblingly landed.

The God Lord and Ming Hao lifted their heads to watch with severe countenances. They were dumbstruck, indeed.

At this moment, they remembered that Shi Yan had used the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower to break all the restrictions and barriers that Ling Mei, Batum, and the others had set up in just one strike!

The God Lord and Ming Hao were frightened. They were scared because of that invincible might.

At this moment, Shi Yan, in his wrath, had controlled the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower that was pressing on their heads. They were startled, indeed. They now recognized that with the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower in this Absolute Beginning vestige, Shi Yan wasn’t a soft persimmon for them to squeeze as they pleased.

“Although I can’t break the light curtain immediately, it’s not a big deal to control the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower to play with you two!” Shi Yan said harshly.

The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower fell from the sky.

So many light layers dropped from the sky streaming into the windows on the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. At that moment, the threat from the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower rocketed several times!

Under that pressure, the God Lord and Ming Hao could hear their bones cracking. They seemed to not be able to resist such pressure and their bodies were about to burst.

That pressure wasn’t aimed at Audrey and Mei Ji. When they saw things going wrong, they had parted already.

“This pressure could be compared to a strike from Territory Ancestor Realm experts! Extremely formidable, indeed!” Ming Hong couldn’t help but scream on Audrey’s shoulder. “What are they doing? That young man doesn’t know the general picture and those two old men have lost their minds! If they continue this way, they will die altogether before the enemies come!”

Audrey and Mei Ji were worried and sorrowful. They didn’t know what to say to ease this situation.

“Kid, you dare to attack us now? You aren’t afraid of death, are you?” bellowed the God Lord.

“Shi Yan! What the heck are you doing?!” screamed Ming Hao.

“I want to tell you that even if I can’t break the restriction in this area, you don’t have the right to babble here. I’m standing here to see who you will bury with me. You asked who courts death?” Shi Yan sneered and looked crazy. “Ming Hao, I am the Master of the Bloodthirsty Force. With your dark scheme, you want trouble, don’t you? I’ll show you that the prestige of the Bloodthirsty Force’s Master isn’t something you can challenge!”

The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower descended grumblingly with terrifying waves of energy fluctuations that created waves of light above Ming Hao and the God Lord.

Ming Hao and the God Lord straightened their bodies, their hands pushing the sky. One of them had five stars revolving and the other had billions of clones. Altogether, they were trying to resist the descending Power Upanishad Symbol Tower.

Gan Fu, Batum, Yerburgh, Telika, and Farlow were all experts at the Immortal Realm. After they died, the negative energies including brutality, desperation, resent, and others in their Essence Qi had poured into Shi Yan’s acupuncture points.

After their soul altars were swallowed, many pieces of memories that didn’t belong to Shi Yan continuously flashed in his mind. They troubled him a lot. He was annoyed and irritated. The negative energies seized the chance to affect him.

Because he couldn’t break the light curtain, he had lost his patience and become edgy. Negative energies attacked him easily in this condition.

The God Lord’s jeering and sinister words, Ming Hao observing him with his cold eyes and the dark conspiracy... Shi Yan knew them all. At this moment, he finally cracked and lost his temper. He ignored the light curtain, Neptune, and the others. After his volcano ignited, he erupted.

BOOM!

Between the God Lord, Ming Hao, and the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, there was a combat area where the energy from the tower entangled with the God Lord’s and Ming Hao’s energies. Their energies were colliding and fighting against each other. That area was so beautiful with blazing sparks and magnificent blooming lights. It was more impressive than the most beautiful firework performance.

However, the energy from the impact was extremely terrifying.

The energy shockwaves had crushed the rocks and the ruins around into powder in just a blink of an eye. Everything had become dust.

Audrey and Mei Ji had to move further away to avoid the fierce battle. They screamed because Shi Yan had suddenly become frantic and stirred the situation to the point that they couldn’t save it. They felt so begrudging.

Mei Ji and Audrey wanted to cry, thinking that while the others were fighting, the warriors of the Sea of Annihilation like Neptune were marching toward them.

Why did they have to do that?

“Shi Yan, are you crazy?!?” Ming Hao thundered. So many clones of him perished while colliding with the energy from the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower.

He could feel his energy drain away as the energy from the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was crushing down. Seeing the God Lord about to burst out frantically, he regretted it.

He regretted letting the God Lord threaten Shi Yan.

He regretted not recognizing how dangerous Shi Yan could be in this area with the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower in his hands!

“Haha, I’ve had to endure you guys for a long time!” Shi Yan sat on the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower and laughed crazily. “Today, I will play everything I have. Even if I die, I will show you my power! Do you still think you’re invincible? If you are, how could Hui throw you here and trap you for dozens of years? Well, if you don’t see the danger, you won’t remember for a long time. You still think you’re the overlords!”

Boom!

The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower continued to press down.

“ARRRGGGHHH!”

The God Lord and Ming Hao roared. They felt like so many planets were placed on their heads that they couldn’t even stand upright.

Ming Hao was just a soul so his condition wasn’t really bad. His soul flickered as his soul power was quickly consumed.

The God Lord’s body made “crack” sounds as if he was about to shatter.

They found that the frantic Shi Yan was even tougher than Bloodthirsty. This kid didn’t reason or use logic. He didn’t care about the general picture too. He wasn’t afraid of death. To vie for some vague thing, he could even destroy the whole world.

When they finally recognized this, they felt so bitter. They couldn’t estimate how strong he was with the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower in this area.

They were all regretful. They shouldn’t have pushed Shi Yan to make him burst out at the end of the corner. They shouldn’t have attacked him verbally and instead try to clear the situation.

Unfortunately, their regret came a little too late. Shi Yan’s eyes turned garnet in his frenzied state. They knew that he wouldn’t listen to any word, so they could only resist persistently.

They reaped what they sowed, indeed.

They smiled bitterly.

Audrey and Mei Ji felt their scalps become numb. They were so worried as if they had a flame burning their hearts. They decided to scream about how Neptune and the others were coming to persuade them to stop.

“No use. The boy’s eyes are red now. It’s the sign of his exploding state. I understood the Bloodthirsty Force enough to tell you that in such a state, he has lost his mind. He can’t hear you,” sighed Ming Hong.

“Then what should we do?” Mei Ji was panic-stricken.

“There is no solution,” Ming Hong shook his head.

All of a sudden, the seawater forcefully fell from the sky. They heard the sounds of swarming water, baffling them.

However, they knew what had happened shortly after. They couldn’t hide their thrill. Mei Ji shrilled, “Broken! It’s broken!”

“I got it! The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower has taken too much energy from the light curtain. It’s not enough to resist anymore. The water pressure finally tore it. Lucky bastard! The boy just bumped around and he found the right method!” Ming Hong also screamed strangely.
